3 min read
Just now

--

Press enter or click to view image in full size

The Buzz Marketershttps://thebuzzmarketers.com/
If your to-do list is longer than you had anticipated today you are not alone. Most marketers experience this on a daily basis. You get into work with the best of intentions and your plan is simple enough at the start of your day: write captions, create designs, evaluate your competitors, set up posts, respond to your emails, and now suddenly five hours have passed, and you can’t figure out what happened.
What’s the good news? The good news is that a lot of the busy work can be taken off your plate with AI.
Press enter or click to view image in full size

Photo by fabio on UnsplashHere are 10 AI marketing tools that will allow you to work smarter by saving time, while focusing on what actually drives results.
1) ChatGPT — From generating content ideas, to outlining a blog, emailing drafts, or providing social media captions, this is like having another team mate who is always available.
2) Canva AI– If you need to create a presentation, social media post or an ad creative quickly, Canva AI will help you to quickly turn your thought into a visual, without having to spend hours creating something from scratch.
3) Claude — Ideal for long-form content, researching the topic you are writing about, or improving your draft. This is your editor that never gets tired.
4) Perplexity– Compared to opening 15 browser tabs, Perplexity will give you the answers (with the sources) to all your questions in one place, saving you time in researching.
5) Notion AI — Organisation is key when it comes to meeting notes, content planning and brainstorming sessions. Notion AI will help to create some order from the chaos and to maintain movement on a project.
6) Grammarly — This has been a standard in the marketing industry for years and it will continue for the foreseeable future.
7) Jasper -The ideal tool for generating marketing copy, advertising creatives, product descriptions, and campaign messages at scale.
8) Opus Clip -In a few minutes, you can create several short videos from a single long one to post on social media. This takes so much time away from a company’s content production team.
9) Fireflies.ai- This product records meetings, creates meeting transcripts, and summarizes discussions automatically, so there are no more frantically taking notes.
10) Midjourney -Do you need creative images or ideas for your campaign? With Midjourney, you can generate beautiful pictures and generate new ideas.
Using More AI is Not the Real Purpose…
Many marketers collect AI tools like they were Pokémon cards.
The goal is not to use every available AI tool.
Press enter or click to view image in full size

Photo by Afif Ramdhasuma on UnsplashThe purpose of using AI is to free up time spent on doing meaningless tasks, so that you can spend more time with your thoughts on strategy, creativity and decision-making.
Because at the end of the day AI won’t take the place of a great marketer.
An effective marketer using AI will certainly have a competitive edge.
